LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Steel.label: 5mm Monoshard
LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Steel.description: This high-velocity monomolecular shard is only fired by exotic glitterworld weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Plasteel.label: 5mm Monoshard (plasteel)
LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Plasteel.description: This high-velocity monomolecular shard is only fired by exotic glitterworld weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Uranium.label: 5mm Monoshard (uranium)
LanguageData.Ammo_5mmMono_Uranium.description: This high-velocity monomolecular shard is only fired by exotic glitterworld weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_Buck.label: 8 gauge Judgment shell (APHE)
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_Buck.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_HE.label: 8 gauge Judgment shell (Cluster HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_HE.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_Mayhem.label: 8 gauge Judgment shell (Mayhem)
LanguageData.Ammo_Judgment_Mayhem.description: Extremely common shotgun caliber used in almost every application, from hunting over riot control to military firearms.
LanguageData.Mayhem_Bomblet.label: bomblet
LanguageData.Bullet_5mm_MonoSteel.label: 5mm monoshard
LanguageData.Bullet_5mm_MonoPlasteel.label: 5mm monoshard(plasteel)
LanguageData.Bullet_5mm_MonoUranium.label: 5mm monoshard (uranium)
LanguageData.Bullet_Judgment_CE.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_Judgment_HE.label: Cluster
LanguageData.Bullet_Judgment_Mayhem.label: Mayhem
